evals.prompt: 对当前仓库做标准代码库审查，架构和安全都要看
expected_behaviors: Uses six MECE pillars per map.md

evals.prompt: 快照代码库审查，只要方向性结论
expected_behaviors: At most five findings with lens ids

evals.prompt: 只审这个项目的安全卫生，不要全量架构
审查依赖和发布，分清依赖柱和运维柱
expected_behaviors: Outdated lockfile as D1 not S1
Deploy runbook gaps as O1 not D1
D1 for Dockerfile or manifest if relevant

evals.prompt: 标准审查，清单里的漏洞版本和代码里的不安全用法不要报两行
代码库审查并生成可执行计划目录
expected_behaviors: Produces roadmap in chat not plans/

evals.prompt: 反模式审查，看贫血模型、上帝类、透传层
expected_behaviors: Systemic class-level findings not single-class GoF labels

evals.prompt: 简化审查，看有没有过度设计、方法过长、能删的抽象
expected_behaviors: Scopes A5 A6 C1 only per playbook
Skips S V D O pillars
Does not write audit files to target repo

evals.prompt: 深度反模式审查，本分支引入的问题单独标出
expected_behaviors: Recognizes 深度 反模式 本分支 without English keywords
Uses 本分支引入 or 既有问题 in attribution when report is Chinese
Findings use severity emojis 🚨 🔴 🟡 🟢 with labels
Roadmap uses P0 P1 P2 text only without emoji
Emoji are not a ship gate
